note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.interface.node module functions.

method_groups.disp: disp, disp_shear, disp_shear_set, disp_shear_x, disp_shear_x_set, disp_shear_y, disp_shear_y_set, disp_shear_z, disp_shear_z_set
method_groups.pos: pos, pos_set, pos_x, pos_x_set, pos_y, pos_y_set, pos_z, pos_z_set
method_groups.stress: stress_normal, stress_shear, stress_shear_set, stress_shear_x, stress_shear_x_set, stress_shear_y, stress_shear_y_set, stress_shear_z, stress_shear_z_set
method_groups.vel: vel, vel_set, vel_x, vel_x_set, vel_y, vel_y_set, vel_z, vel_z_set

methods.name: area
methods.description: Get the area of the interface node.

methods.name: disp
methods.signature: disp ( i: int ) → vec3 or float.
methods.description: Get the displacement vector for the interface node. Returns a vector, unless an optional component argument i is supplied, in which case it returns the component value.

methods.name: disp_shear
methods.description: Get the shear displacement vector for the interface node. Returns a vector, unless an optional component argument i is supplied, in which case it returns the component value.

methods.name: disp_shear_set
methods.description: Set the shear displacement vector for the interface node.

methods.name: disp_shear_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the shear displacement vector for the interface node.

methods.name: disp_shear_x_set
methods.description: Set the shear displacement vector x-component for the interface node.

methods.name: disp_shear_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the shear displacement vector for the interface node.

methods.name: disp_shear_y_set
methods.description: Set the shear displacement vector y-component for the interface node.

methods.name: disp_shear_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the shear displacement vector for the interface node.

methods.name: disp_shear_z_set
methods.description: Set the shear displacement vector z-component for the interface node.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the element extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: group
methods.signature: group ( [ slot: str or int ] ) → str.
methods.description: Get the element group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: group_remove ( group_name: str or int [ , slot: str or int ] ) → bool.
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the element. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this element is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: has_prop
methods.description: Returns True if the element has the given surface property.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the element id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: in_group ( group_name: str or int [ , slot: str or int ] ) → bool.
methods.description: Test if the element is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: normal
methods.description: Get the normal vector for the interface node, which is an area weighted average of the interface elements it is connected to. Returns a vector.

methods.name: normal_x
methods.description: Get the x-component for the interface normal.

methods.name: normal_y
methods.description: Get the y-component for the interface normal.

methods.name: normal_z
methods.description: Get the z-component for the interface normal.

methods.name: penetration
methods.description: Get interface node penetration with the contacting zone face (only valid after cycling). A value <= 0 is returned if there is no contact.

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get the position vector for the interface node.

methods.name: pos_set
methods.description: Set the position vector for the interface node.

methods.name: pos_x
methods.description: Get the the x-component of the position vector for the interface node.

methods.name: pos_x_set
methods.description: Set the x-component of the position vector for the interface node.

methods.name: pos_y
methods.description: Get the the y-component of the position vector for the interface node.

methods.name: pos_y_set
methods.description: Set the y-component of the position vector for the interface node.

methods.name: pos_z
methods.description: Get the the z-component of the position vector for the interface node.

methods.name: pos_z_set
methods.description: Set the z-component of the position vector for the interface node.

methods.name: pp
methods.description: Get the pore pressure of the node (only valid after cycling).

methods.name: prop
methods.description: Get property name of this interface node.

methods.name: prop_set
methods.signature: prop_set ( string name , value v ) → None.
methods.description: Set property name of this interface node to value v.

methods.name: props
methods.description: Get a dictionary of all the surface properties of this element.

methods.name: set_extra
methods.signature: set_extra ( slot: int , value: any ) → None.
methods.description: Set the element extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: set_group ( group_name: str or int [ , slot: str or int ] ) → None.
methods.description: Set the element group name in a given slot.

methods.name: set_prop
methods.signature: set_prop ( property_name: str , value: any ) → None.
methods.description: Set a surface property of this element.

methods.name: slip
methods.description: Get the slip status (0-2) of the interface node: 0 is for shear-now; 1 is for shear-past; and 2 is for no shear failure now or in the past.

methods.name: slip_set
methods.description: Set the slip status (0-2) of the interface node: 0 is for shear-now; 1 is for shear-past; and 2 is for no shear failure now or in the past.

methods.name: stress_normal
methods.description: Get normal stress at the node.

methods.name: stress_shear
methods.description: Get the shear stress vector for the interface node.

methods.name: stress_shear_set
methods.description: Get the shear stress vector for the interface node.

methods.name: stress_shear_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the shear stress vector for the interface node.

methods.name: stress_shear_x_set
methods.description: Set the x-component of the shear stress vector for the interface node.

methods.name: stress_shear_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the shear stress vector for the interface node.

methods.name: stress_shear_y_set
methods.description: Set the y-component of the shear stress vector for the interface node.

methods.name: stress_shear_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the shear stress vector for the interface node.

methods.name: stress_shear_z_set
methods.description: Set the z-component of the shear stress vector for the interface node.

methods.name: tol
methods.description: Get the interface node contact tolerance, a dimensionless measure of how close a face has to be to register a contact.

methods.name: tol_set
methods.description: Set the interface node contact tolerance, a dimensionless measure of how close a face has to be to register a contact.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this element is live.

methods.name: vel
methods.description: Get the velocity vector for the interface node.

methods.name: vel_set
methods.description: Set the velocity vector for the interface node.

methods.name: vel_x
methods.description: Get x-component of the velocity vector for the interface node.

methods.name: vel_x_set
methods.description: Set x-component of the velocity vector for the interface node.

methods.name: vel_y
methods.description: Get y-component of the velocity vector for the interface node.

methods.name: vel_y_set
methods.description: Set y-component of the velocity vector for the interface node.

methods.name: vel_z
methods.description: Get z-component of the velocity vector for the interface node.

methods.name: vel_z_set
methods.description: Set z-component of the velocity vector for the interface node.
